title: Add typed backend profile models
description: Add Pydantic profile models that validate deterministic sections, enum values, numeric ranges, and unknown fields. Keep profiles structured and reusable by future formatting and quality engines.
acceptance_criteria: Given a profile contains identity/page/fonts/body/headings/captions/equations/references/quality sections, validation accepts it. Given required fields are missing, invalid enum/range values are provided, or unknown fields appear, validation returns field-level errors.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q
review_initial_requirements: format-profile-schema: Deterministic profile schema / Valid profile is accepted / Missing required field is rejected / Invalid enum or numeric range is rejected
review_regression_requirements: Existing FileRecord and JobRecord validation still passes foundation tests.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q -> 4 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_foundation.py -q -> 5 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add built-in ECNU thesis YAML seed
description: Add profiles/ecnu_thesis.yaml with source-derived page, font, body, heading, caption, equation, reference, and quality settings. Avoid presenting unverified school rules as authoritative.
acceptance_criteria: On backend startup, ecnu_thesis is available with status active, version 1.0.0, source system, A4 documented margins, Songti/Heiti/Times New Roman font rules, body line spacing, heading rules, abstract settings, captions, equations, references, and quality flags.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q
review_initial_requirements: format-profile-schema: Built-in ECNU thesis profile / ECNU profile is available / ECNU profile includes required format fields
review_regression_requirements: Profile seed loading must not require network or external document tooling during app startup.
refs: profiles/ecnu_thesis.yaml; backend/app/profiles/seed.py; docs/word-format-agent-web-product-plan.md; 格式集/华东师范大学毕业论文格式要求.doc
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q -> 5 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_foundation.py -q -> 5 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add backend schema tests
description: Add focused tests for valid ECNU YAML, missing required fields, invalid enum/range values, unknown fields, and YAML round trip behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Tests fail before schema implementation and pass after implementation. Tests cover acceptance and rejection paths listed in format-profile-schema specs.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q
review_initial_requirements: format-profile-schema: Deterministic profile schema / YAML profile serialization
review_regression_requirements: cd backend && uv run pytest -q remains green.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q -> 7 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 12 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Persist profile summaries and immutable versions
description: Extend JsonMetadataRepository with profile summary and profile version storage while preserving existing files/jobs metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Repository can list profile summaries, get a profile version, save new versions without overwriting old versions, reject duplicate versions, and archive summaries while retaining versions.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q
review_initial_requirements: profile-versioning: Profile listing and detail / Versioned profile saves / Profile archive
review_regression_requirements: Existing files/jobs metadata remains readable when metadata.json lacks profile keys.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles.py -q -> 10 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 15 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add profile API routes
description: Add endpoints for profile list, detail/version retrieval, create-version, archive, YAML import, and YAML export, backed by schema validation and repository methods.
acceptance_criteria: Clients can list profiles, retrieve existing profile versions, receive 404 for missing profile/version, create draft profiles, save new versions, reject duplicate versions, archive profiles, export YAML, import valid YAML, and reject invalid YAML without saving.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py -q
review_initial_requirements: profile-versioning: Profile listing and detail / Versioned profile saves / Profile archive; format-profile-schema: YAML profile serialization
review_regression_requirements: Health, file upload, and existing job endpoints continue to work.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py -q -> 4 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 19 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Store optional job profile references
description: Extend placeholder job request and JobRecord with optional profile_id and profile_version and validate supplied references before job creation.
acceptance_criteria: Creating a job with an existing profile_id and profile_version stores both values. Creating a job with a missing profile id or version returns an error and does not create a job. Creating an unprofiled placeholder job still works.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py tests/test_foundation.py -q
review_initial_requirements: profile-versioning: Jobs reference profile versions / Create job with profile reference / Reject job with missing profile reference
review_regression_requirements: Existing job creation tests without profile references continue passing.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py tests/test_foundation.py -q -> 10 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 20 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Add backend API tests for profile workflow
description: Cover profile CRUD/versioning, import/export, archive behavior, and job profile references through FastAPI TestClient.
acceptance_criteria: API tests fail before API implementation and pass after implementation, including error cases for duplicate versions, missing profiles, invalid YAML, and invalid job profile references.
test_mcp: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py -q
review_initial_requirements: profile-versioning: all scenarios; format-profile-schema: YAML profile serialization
review_regression_requirements: cd backend && uv run pytest -q remains green.
notes: verification:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py -q -> 5 passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest -q -> 20 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Extend frontend profile API client
description: Add TypeScript types and API client methods for profile summaries, profile detail/version, save version, archive, YAML import/export, and profile-aware job creation.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend code can call backend profile endpoints with typed payloads. createJob can include profile_id and profile_version while preserving unprofiled job creation.
review_initial_requirements: profile-editor: Profile list UI / Structured profile editing / YAML import and export UI / Profile-aware job creation UI
review_regression_requirements: Existing upload and unprofiled job UI still type-checks and builds.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; regression:existing upload/job client still type-checks

title: Add profile list and detail UI
description: Load profiles from the backend and show profile name, status, current version, source, updated timestamp, selected detail, and a non-blocking error state.
acceptance_criteria: When profiles load, the workbench displays metadata for each profile and selected detail. When the profile API fails, the frontend shows a non-blocking error while upload/job areas remain usable.
review_initial_requirements: profile-editor: Profile list UI / Profiles are loaded / Profile load fails
review_regression_requirements: Layout remains responsive and does not overlap on desktop or mobile build output.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; regression:upload/job panels still type-check and render in the same app shell

title: Add structured profile editing controls
description: Add form controls for common profile fields including profile name/version/status, page margins, body font/line spacing, heading style, caption positions, and quality flags.
acceptance_criteria: User edits common fields without direct YAML editing, saves a valid edited profile version, refreshes profile list/detail after success, and sees backend validation errors without losing draft state.
review_initial_requirements: profile-editor: Structured profile editing / User edits common fields / User saves edited profile / Save validation fails
review_regression_requirements: Existing upload form and job controls remain usable after editor state changes.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; structured editor saves through backend API and preserves draft on validation errors

title: Add YAML import and export UI
description: Add advanced YAML import/export controls that call backend endpoints and display validation errors without implying a successful import.
acceptance_criteria: Valid YAML import creates a draft profile and displays it in the list. Invalid YAML import displays validation errors and does not show a success state. Export displays or downloads YAML for the selected profile version.
review_initial_requirements: profile-editor: YAML import and export UI / User imports valid YAML / User imports invalid YAML / User exports YAML
review_regression_requirements: Structured editor draft remains intact when YAML import fails.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; YAML import/export controls call backend and keep draft state on failed import

title: Send selected profile version when creating jobs
description: Update placeholder job creation UI to include selected profile_id and profile_version when a profile is selected, while supporting unprofiled jobs.
acceptance_criteria: With an uploaded file and selected profile version, job creation sends profile_id/profile_version and displays them in job status. Without a selected profile, job creation sends no profile reference or clearly creates an unprofiled job.
review_initial_requirements: profile-editor: Profile-aware job creation UI / User creates job with selected profile / No profile selected
review_regression_requirements: Backend job API tests for profiled and unprofiled jobs pass.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; regression:cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_profiles_api.py tests/test_foundation.py -q -> 10 passed, 1 known StarletteDeprecationWarning

title: Update profile management documentation
description: Update README docs with profile storage, ECNU seed data, API routes, frontend workflow, and current no-formatting boundary.
acceptance_criteria: README/backend/frontend documentation describes where profiles live, how versions/import/export work, how jobs reference profile versions, and clarifies that actual DOCX formatting is still a later change.
test_mcp: manual: review README.md backend/README.md frontend/README.md for profile management instructions
review_initial_requirements: proposal.md Impact documentation items; design.md non-goals and no-formatting boundary
review_regression_requirements: Startup instructions from foundation remain accurate.

title: Run profile workflow verification
description: Run backend tests, frontend build, and OpenSpec strict validation for the completed profile management workflow. Update CSV with final verification evidence.
acceptance_criteria: openspec validate add-profile-management --strict --no-interactive passes. cd backend && uv run pytest passes. cd frontend && npm run build passes, or notes contain validation_limited/manual_test/risk entries for any unavailable verification.
test_mcp: openspec validate add-profile-management --strict --no-interactive && cd backend && uv run pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run build
review_regression_requirements: Foundation health/upload/job tests and frontend build remain green.
